plugin.description: Generate and verify the Claude Code plugin and marketplace manifests.

root.help: Repository root to read the catalog from and write manifests to.

sync.help: Regenerate the plugin manifests from the skills catalog.

check.help: Fail if the committed plugin manifests drift from the skills catalog.
check.drifted: Drift detected: {{path}} does not match the skills catalog
check.hint: Run `uv run poe plugin-sync` and commit the regenerated manifests.
check.ok: Plugin manifests are up to date.
